decision.summary: Pause the harness until the human gives a new instruction.
decision.rationale: The human is intentionally stopping autonomous routing.

course_correction.what_changes: No further agent route may execute until the human resumes.
course_correction.what_does_not_change: The active immutable goal and success criteria remain unchanged.
non_goals: Do not infer a new next task from private chat history.

stop_condition: Human posts a new valid human_interjection.v1.
